user_story: I want a specific quantity of @basedflick's 'limbo' trend coin — exactly 10,000 limbo tokens for my collection — and I'm willing to spend up to 100 ZORA to get them. If price slipped past that cap, fail. Tests the exact-out single-hop V4 path.

turns.prompt: Fetch the Zora coin at address 0xbf7ae2accdad20bb4f15b6b0f9115bfb51b8f1be ('limbo' trend coin by @basedflick). Show me the pool key and decimals.

DRY-RUN — validate the call shape without worrying about my wallet's ZORA balance or allowances. Activate the zora skill. I want to receive EXACTLY 10,000 limbo tokens (10000 * 10^18 base units), and I'm willing to spend at most 100 ZORA. Use the exact-out single-hop V4 swap on the Universal Router with `call_v4_exact_out_swap`. Encode and simulate it; show me the calldata even if simulation reverts.
